title: dendrorkis ramulosa
intro: Dendrorkis ramulosa, also known as the club moss, is a type of ancient, vascular plant that belongs to the group Lycopodiophyta. The medicinal properties of Dendrorkis ramulosa have been utilized in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Dendrorkis ramulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
